main.event: Google, Microsoft and Intel to post Earnings
main.text-1:
Similar to a solar eclipse, an opportunity like this does not come very often. On January 26th (after markets close) three tech giants are going to post their earnings reports.

Google (Alphabet Inc.) is a leading stock, a prominent feature in portfolios of investors of all sizes. Market analysts mostly agree on an earnings prognosis of $9.65/share on $20.51 billion in revenue. That would be a significant jump even for Google, minding that last quarter the EPS was at $7.06. A forecast this optimistic gives confidence to traders to go bullish on GOOG.
main.text-2: Microsoft, meanwhile, demonstrates a much more humble prognosis: an EPS of $0.79 as opposed to last quarter’s $0.76. And considering the expectations for this stock’s performance were never too far off, it’s safe to say Microsoft will not wow us on Thursday. However, it’s still a safe investment option.
main.text-3: Intel Corporation is expected to be this year’s overachiever. With a 3-month change to the stock price currently at +7.18%, analysts believe the company will rally +16% by the end of the year. With an EPS prognosis of $0.75 we can see that forecast coming to life already.
main.head-tip: How to use it in your trading:
main.tip: Enjoy a special 85% profitability on Google, Microsoft and Intel!
main.star: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment. The offer is valid on January 26th and 27th 2017  from 14:40 to 21:00 GMT.
